name: MCMC Auto - Haltom City
description_short: Buy Here Pay Here used car dealer in Haltom City, TX, family-owned since 1969. Provides in-house auto financing for all credit types, including bad and no credit.
description_long:
MCMC Auto is a family-owned and operated used car dealership that has served North Texas since 1969 and is now run by its third generation. The Haltom City location at 5928 E Belknap Street is one of multiple Texas locations and claims to have served over 250,000 North Texas residents, with more than 80,000 customers returning to purchase a second vehicle. The company's long tenure and repeat customer base suggest an established presence in the subprime auto market.

MCMC Auto's core offering is Buy Here Pay Here financing — in-house auto loans extended directly to buyers regardless of credit history. For customers who do not qualify through the in-house program, they also offer referrals to external lending partners. The pre-approval process is available online and the company markets to buyers with all credit types: poor credit, no credit, prior bankruptcies, and repossessions. Most vehicles come with a 4-month/4,000-mile warranty, and extended service contracts are available with no money down.

What distinguishes MCMC from many BHPH dealers is a handful of consumer-friendly commitments. The company reports payment history to Experian monthly, which gives buyers an active credit-building pathway alongside their vehicle purchase — a feature not universal in the BHPH segment. The company explicitly states it does not install starter interrupt devices or payment-due beeping systems in vehicles, which are common (and controversial) tools used by some BHPH lenders to enforce collections. The MyCar Program allows customers to upgrade to a newer vehicle once their balance reaches a low threshold, providing a loyalty incentive. The Haltom City location holds a 4.8-star rating from over 2,300 Google reviews.

For consumers considering MCMC, the core value proposition is clear: transportation plus a path to credit recovery, from a long-established local operator. The honest caveat is that Buy Here Pay Here financing universally carries higher interest rates and total loan costs than traditional auto lending — MCMC does not publicly disclose APR, rate ranges, or loan terms on its website, so prospective buyers should request and compare the full cost of financing before signing. This is not a general-purpose lender; it is solely an auto dealer, and the 'loan' is tied entirely to a vehicle purchase.
address: 5928 E Belknap St, Haltom City, TX 76117

company_info.headquarters: 5928 E Belknap St, Haltom City, TX 76117

pros: Reports payment history to Experian monthly, actively helping customers rebuild credit
No starter interrupt devices or payment-reminder alerts installed in vehicles
Family-owned since 1969 with over 250,000 North Texas customers served
4-month/4,000-mile warranty included on most vehicles at no extra cost
Extended service contracts available with $0 down payment required
MyCar upgrade program allows customers to move into a newer vehicle as loan balance decreases
4.8-star Google rating from 2,323 reviews at this location
cons: Buy Here Pay Here financing typically carries significantly higher interest rates than traditional auto loans — no APR or rate range disclosed on the website
Financing is limited exclusively to vehicle purchases; cannot be used for any other consumer need
Pre-approval consent form requires agreement to automated calls, pre-recorded messages, and automated texts
Inventory is used vehicles only, with no publicly listed prices or inventory details on the location page
Single Haltom City location reviewed here — buyers outside DFW have no access to this program
best_for: Subprime borrowers in the Dallas-Fort Worth area who need a vehicle and cannot qualify for traditional auto financing
People actively trying to rebuild credit through on-time monthly auto loan payments reported to Experian
Buyers with recent bankruptcies, repossessions, or no credit history who have been turned away elsewhere
North Texas residents who prefer a long-established local operator over a large dealership chain
diagnosis: Best suited for DFW-area consumers with damaged or no credit who need reliable transportation and want to simultaneously rebuild their credit profile through reported on-time payments. The primary caveat is that Buy Here Pay Here loans carry materially higher interest rates and total costs than conventional auto loans — buyers must request full loan terms and calculate total repayment cost before committing, as none of this is disclosed on the website.
services: Buy Here Pay Here in-house auto financing
External lender referral program for additional financing options
Monthly payment reporting to Experian credit bureau
Multi-point vehicle inspection by certified technicians
MyCar Program — upgrade to newer vehicle at low loan balance
Financing programs for all credit types including bad and no credit
